articles.title: Artificial intelligence adoption in healthcare: a systematic review of implementation challenges and health services implications
articles.summary: Abstract The adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the healthcare sector offers an unprecedented opportunity to revolutionize global health systems by addressing growing challenges related to efficiency, accessibility, and quality of care. articles.title: Human-Machine Interfaces in Health: A Critical Review and Framework of Human-Centered Design Practices
articles.summary: The design of human-machine interfaces (HMIs) in healthcare is a determining factor for the safety, efficiency, and accessibility of medical technologies worldwide. articles.title: Pedagogical Possibilities and Didactic Significance of Artificial Intelligence Technologies in the Digital Educational Environment
articles.summary: This article analyses the pedagogical possibilities and didactic significance of artificial intelligence technologies in the digital educational environment. The research is based on Bloom's "2-sigma problem", Vygotsky's “zone of proximal development”, Papert's constructionism theory, and Gardner's theory of multiple…

articles.summary: In February 2024, the Superior Electoral Court of Brazil met in session to determine rules and regulations to guide the municipal elections of the country in October of 2024.
